data.title: 国际服活动复刻「Head Prefect Hina's Summer Break!」
data.summary: [Event Preview] Summer has come again to Kivotos. Join in on the Gehenna Prefect Team's Grueling Sum
data.body:
[Event Preview]

Summer has come again to Kivotos.
Join in on the Gehenna Prefect Team's Grueling Summer Boot Camp on 3/14 (Tue)!
